 •
That ever since 1973, the defendant No.1 has been in 
continuous, uninterrupted possession and occupation of the 
suit property in his own right and during this period i.e. 1973 
to 1997, the father Shri Kundan Lal neither filed any ejectment 
proceedings nor served any notice for his eviction during his 
lifetime, who died on 10.04.1997.
8. 
The Respondent No.1 / Plaintiff who was duly served has not entered 
appearance and is proceeded ex-parte. 
9. 
Mrs. Rekha Pandey, Learned Counsel for Respondent No.2/ 
Defendant No. 2 has made the following submissions:
 •
That the defendant No. 2 has purchased 50% share of the suit 
property from the defendant No.1 / Ramesh Chand.
 •
That the High Court vide order dated 28.02.2011 in RFA 
No. 358/2000 as well as this Court vide interim order dated 
26.08.2013 in present appeal has protected the right of the 
Respondent no. 2 as he was a bona fide purchaser of the 
property and is in possession of the property.
 •
